title: Horeca White Tealights Candles 24 Pack - 24 Hour Burn Time - Unscented Tea Lights - Transparent Plastic Cup - Candles Long Burning for Home, Wedding, Decoration, Catering
features: EXCEPTIONAL 24HR MAXI TEA LIGHTS: Enjoy unmatched quality with our long-burning tea lights, designed to glow for up to 24 hours. Perfect for creating a cozy atmosphere, they provide a consistent, long-lasting light and come in a pack of 24 candles.

LONG-LASTING & SMOKE-FREE TEA LIGHT: With an exceptional 24-hour burn time, these tealight candles provide a steady glow for any event. Featuring cotton wicks, they ensure a stable, drip-free, and smoke-free flame, creating a clean and cozy ambiance.

BRIGHT EFFECT AND SAFE BURNING: Tealights with clear plastic casing (acrylic) and a vibrant flame that creates an attractive luminous effect. Ideal for use in candle holders. The plastic casing allows for safe burning of the tea candles and also protects against wax stains and unsightly wax residues.
DIMENSIONS: Diameter: 50 mm, Height: 60 mm, packed in a set of 24 white tea lights. They are suitable for both indoor and outdoor use.
VERSATILITY OF USE: Horeca Candles tea lights are perfect for romantic moments, restaurants, as decorations for birthday parties, or to create a relaxing atmosphere in a spa.
description: Product description These classic tea light candles from Horeca Candles are wonderful for any occasion. They are of particularly high quality and are characterized mainly by their excellent burning behavior and the beautiful luminous intensity compared to classic aluminum candles. The candles are made of the purest paraffin and, thanks to their long duration of about 24 hours, they make every room and every party shine with a warm light! Safety Warning Keep candles away from flammable materials. Do not leave them on unattended. Get rid of candle debris properly.
